MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT TRUE COMPASS LLC'S MOTION FOR AN AWARD OF REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS is Granted. No opposition filed. Defendant is awarded fees of $14,545.11 and costs of $250.11. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS TRUE COMPASS LLC AND MIGSIF, LLC'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES (SLAPP).

APPEARANCES: A. Cabral Bonner, Esq. of Law Offices of Charles A. Bonner 331-3070 for pltfs & opposing parties; Jak Marquez, Esq. & Curtis F. Dowling, Esq. of Dowling & Marquez LLP 495-8500 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court denied the motion as to MIGSIF, LLC and granted the motion as to TRUE COMPASS LLC. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
